items.title: Whitespace "managed data platform" prices at ~£120k with ~18% margin headroom
items.detail: Pricing sheet · median of 3 comparable engagements · above current blended rate
evidence: Pricing 2026 › Comparable builds › managed data platform · median £118k · blended margin 42% vs 24% book average
items.note: Joins to the corpus: a whitespace signal already shows several healthcare clients asking for this. Pricing puts a number on it — a quantified, priced offer instead of a hunch.
